featuredArticles.title: The Spec-Driven Writing Framework: Building a Writer's Room with Agentic Workflows
featuredArticles.excerpt: What if you treated writing exactly like software engineering? This framework transforms content creation from a time-intensive craft into a scalable engineering process using specifications, version control, and AI agents. Reduce article creation time from weeks to hours while maintaining quality through explicit, repeatable processes.
